# Hookit

Hookit is a creator discovery platform.

Creators publish Hooks containing:

- Products
- Blogs
- Research
- Travel discoveries
- Art
- Architecture
- Books
- News
- Videos

Every Hook is a public discoverable page designed to help users find useful resources and connect with the original creator.

Important URLs:

https://hookit.online
https://hookit.online/explore
https://hookit.online/categories

Hooks:
https://hookit.online/hook/[slug]

Categories:
https://hookit.online/category/[slug]

Creators:
https://hookit.online/creator/[username]
